_comment: Projectile (arrow-volley) trails (#65). Visible in any battle with archers, so this reuses the bundled showcase battle — watch the Archers: each volley now throws a short cluster of streaks from the shooter toward its target, fading as it lands. Purely cosmetic (spawned on the sim tick, faded on render time); no sim/replay/determinism impact.
caption: Projectile trails (#65): ranged volleys now show — each time Archers loose, a small cluster of arrow streaks flies from the unit to its target and fades as it lands (tinted by team colour). Previously volleys were invisible hitscan + a sound. Purely cosmetic: no sim/replay impact.
